name: sahayak
description: Sahayak — an AI health-triage assistant for India's pharmacy counters. Triages, never prescribes.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.demo: npm run install:all && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.start: npm --prefix server install --omit=dev && cross-env SERVE_CLIENT=true npm --prefix server start
scripts.deploy:build: npm run install:all && npm run build
